mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate declines below 2.5% signal monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings. This mechanism operates continuously and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.09% as of 2019-04-15 indicates sustained low-rate regime
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or mean 20-day forward returns when FEDFUNDS < 2.5% do not exceed baseline returns by at least 50 basis points (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rises above 4.5% signals labor market deterioration and recession risk, triggering equity risk-off behavior and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reprrice growth expectations downward.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 3.6% as of 2019-04-15 remains below trigger threshold
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of instances where UNRATE > 4.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth decelerates below 2% year-over-year while housing starts fall below 1.0 million annualized units, jointly signaling weakening consumer demand. This interaction produces negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days as earnings revisions cascade downward.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth < 2% YoY AND HOUST < 1.0 million units
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 425881M and HOUST at 891K as of 2019-03-15
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 50% of triggered instances, or the interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression of direction_20d on interaction indicator.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declines below 99.5 signals supply-side weakness and potential stagflation risk. When coupled with inflation (CPIAUCSL > 235), this interaction produces negative equity returns over 20 trading days as real discount rates rise and growth expectations fall.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 99.98 and CPIAUCSL at 233.95 as of 2019-04-15
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or interaction coefficient is not significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth decelerates below 100,000 new jobs per month over a 3-month rolling average, signaling labor market cooling. This threshold-triggered mechanism produces negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days as investors anticipate Fed policy reversal and earnings downgrades.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns exceed +1% in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) remains above 2.5% annualized, signaling sustained economic expansion that supports corporate earnings and equity valuations. This always-on mechanism produces positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days in expansion regimes.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 at 15790.1B as of 2019-01-15 indicates ongoing expansion
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods where GDPC1 growth > 2.5%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation (CPIAUCSL) falls below 232 while federal funds rate remains above 1.5%, creating real rate compression that signals monetary policy is becoming restrictive relative to inflation. This regime produces negative equity returns over 5 trading days as growth expectations decline.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 233.95 and FEDFUNDS at 0.09% as of 2019-04-15
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or interaction term is not statistically significant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) decline below 850,000 annualized units, signaling residential construction weakness that cascades into reduced consumer wealth and spending. This threshold-triggered mechanism produces negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days as multiplier effects reduce aggregate demand.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 891K as of 2019-02-15 remains above trigger but near threshold
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed +2% in > 60% of instances where HOUST < 850K, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.
